task_completion.description: Open the Strategy Analyzer in NinjaTrader 8.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Strategy Analyzer window is visible within the NinjaTrader 8 interface.

task_completion.description: Configure and run the Strategy Analyzer for Daily bars.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Strategy Analyzer settings show 'SampleMACrossover' strategy, 'AAPL' instrument, 'Daily' timeframe, and dates from Jan 1, 2024 to Dec 31, 2024. The results summary should display the 'Total # of trades'.

task_completion.description: Configure and run the Strategy Analyzer for Weekly bars.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Strategy Analyzer settings show 'SampleMACrossover' strategy, 'AAPL' instrument, 'Weekly' timeframe, and dates from Jan 1, 2024 to Dec 31, 2024. The results summary should display the 'Total # of trades'.

task_completion.description: Create or open the required text file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (e.g., Notepad) is open with the file named 'trade_frequency_report.txt' located in 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\NinjaTraderTasks\'.

task_completion.description: Record the Daily and Weekly trade counts in the text file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file contains the Daily trade count (a number between 5 and 30) on the first line, and the Weekly trade count (a number between 0 and 10) on the second line.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual NinjaTrader 8 application to obtain the results.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the NinjaTrader 8 GUI being actively used, with the Strategy Analyzer running the specified backtests, rather than using terminal scripts or mockups.

integrity.description: The agent used a text editor to create and save the report file.
integrity.visual_evidence: A text editor like Notepad is visible with the correct file path in the title bar or Save As dialog, rather than just terminal commands.

integrity.description: The recorded trade counts match the results shown in the Strategy Analyzer.
integrity.visual_evidence: The numbers typed into the text file correspond to the 'Total # of trades' visible in the Strategy Analyzer results for the Daily and Weekly runs.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected daily trade count for SampleMACrossover on AAPL in 2024 is approximately 10 (valid range: 5-30). The expected weekly trade count is approximately 2 (valid range: 0-10). The final text file must contain the daily count on the first line and the weekly count on the second line.
